positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical linework illustration of a stylized cosmic botanical arrangement. The centerpiece features interconnected elements: glowing bioluminescent flowers, geometric nebulae patterns, and stylized crystalline foliage. The composition must be centrally focused and highly scalable, suitable for apparel printing. Use a strong limited color palette of deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and muted gold, set against a clean black background. Emphasize strong silhouettes, crisp vector-style lines, and intricate cross-hatching patterns. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and cosmic wonder, with clean, graphic separation between elements to maximize contrast and visual pop. Intricate detail, minimalist complexity, print-ready artwork, high contrast, symmetrical.
negative: blur, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, lowres, artifact, smudge, graffiti
